notes.text: sap.m.Dialog: Screen reader no longer announces the footer button before the link in content
sap.m.MultiInput: no change event on own Token focus
sap.m.Select: Defer value state popup open() to complete setter chain
sap.m.DateRangeSelection: returns parameters based on validity
sap.m.Menu: fix hover state for item with open submenu
sap.m.IconTabHeader: End overflow tab now displays correct count on mobile devices
core/Element: Skip focus redirect on same-parent move
We've now fixed the invalid aria-label on GenericTile with role="presentation"
We've now fixed the incorrect list roles in HeaderContainer that were causing incorrect screen reader announcements
sap.m.DynamicDateRange: option value is not stripped if
We've fixed an issue where the JAWS screen reader launched an application instead of accessing the overflow menu when you pressed Enter on the More button
sap.m.Toolbar: Fix arrow key navigation for Slider, RangeSlider and MultiInput
sap.m.MessageBox: box shadow of the header fixed
We've now fixed the validation issues that occurred when renaming a URL document in UploadSetwithTable
sap.m.Wizard: Progress navigator is properly updated
